evals.prompt: Benchmark the habits cycle prediction engine. Generate tests for predictNextPeriod and estimateFertilityWindow.
evals.expected_output: A Vitest test file created at modules/habits/src/__tests__/prediction.test.ts covering regular cycles, irregular cycles, and edge cases. An evals.json file generated for skill-creator benchmarking.

expectations.name: creates-test-file
expectations.assertion: A test file is created at modules/habits/src/__tests__/prediction.test.ts with at least 5 test cases

expectations.name: tests-regular-cycles
expectations.assertion: Test file includes a test case for regular cycles (e.g., 28-30 day cycles) that verifies predicted next period date

expectations.name: tests-edge-cases
expectations.assertion: Test file includes edge case tests for insufficient data (0 or 1 completed cycles) returning null or error

expectations.name: generates-eval-json
expectations.assertion: An evals.json file is created with skill_name and at least 2 eval entries containing prompt, expected_output, and expectations

evals.prompt: What engines in MyBooks have no test coverage? Generate benchmarks for them.
evals.expected_output: Analysis identifying challenge-engine, progress-engine, and journal-engine as untested, with generated test files and evals for each.

expectations.name: identifies-untested-engines
expectations.assertion: Output identifies at least 2 untested engine files in the books module with specific file paths

expectations.name: generates-multiple-test-files
expectations.assertion: At least 2 test files are created in modules/books/src/__tests__/ for the identified untested engines

expectations.name: assertions-are-domain-specific
expectations.assertion: Test assertions reference domain concepts like reading speed, challenge progress percentage, or streak counting rather than generic structure checks

evals.prompt: Generate evals for the workout state machine in MyWorkouts.
evals.expected_output: Evals.json and test file covering state transitions (idle->playing->paused->rest->completed), set/rep counting, superset logic, and rest timing.

expectations.name: covers-state-transitions
expectations.assertion: Test file includes assertions verifying state transitions: idle to playing, playing to paused, paused to playing, and completion

expectations.name: covers-set-rep-logic
expectations.assertion: Test file includes assertions for set counting (currentSet increments after completing reps) and rep tracking

expectations.name: references-engine-source
expectations.assertion: Output references the specific file path of the workout engine (MyWorkouts/packages/shared/src/workout/engine.ts or similar)
